message: Jake
Yuriko
Patricia
Gloria
Fabar
Kristy
What's wrong, why don't you talk to someone else instead of me?
Don't say it like that.
I thought I would just be a wallflower.
What are you talking about? That's not like you.
Because it seems like I'm the oldest woman here.
That's not true.
Ah.
Ah, I shouldn't have come.
Just kidding.
What’s up, something wrong?
Here they come, our two special guests.
Now we don't have to worry about age anymore.
That's what we call an unnecessary comment.
Don't you have time to talk to someone like me?

Talk

This mansion is huge, isn’t it? The food is delicious, and there’s nothing to nitpick.
You should just enjoy it purely.
No way, it feels boring that way.
But you know, it's a woman's heart to want to look for flaws wherever you go to a party. There’s something unforgivable if it’s almost perfect.
That's a rather twisted woman’s heart.
Well, I think this is normal.
It’s better than a terrible party, but I feel a bit unsatisfied since it’s too fulfilling.
As expected, it becomes glamorous when an actress comes.
Is it what you’d call overwhelming presence?
Ah, I wonder if I’m somewhat envious.
It feels like I don’t belong.
I don’t really understand the movie much, but I heard Guy plays a major league baseball player.
Just like in real life.
Yeah, that’s all he can do, right?
I’m looking forward to what kind of movie it will be.
I’m worried about Guy. Two of the trendiest actresses are involved.
You know, surely.
I think she likes him.
What a sudden thing to say.
Oh, I’m absolutely sure. She keeps asking me all about you.
That’s just her curiosity.
No, it’s different. The serious look in her eyes when she asks about you is close to a girl in love.
That girl is a bit restless, but she’s cute; why not mix business with pleasure with her?
You want me to get a girlfriend?
Well, is that bad?
I wouldn't say it's bad, but I'm not in a hurry to find a partner right now.
I don't want to see you stuck on me forever.
That's pretty confident of you.
Just kidding, I'll take that back. The truth is, I just don't want to see you troubled by your past.
There's no such thing as a ghost from the past.
It was an accident! So you should really forget about her. First of all, she isn't even your girlfriend.
Hey, you really should forget.
I think she could be a good match for you.
Hey, I'm a little curious.
How did she become your assistant?
I hired her after the older lady who used to work here left.
Phew.
Hmm.
Still, you seem unusually fixated on your past.
A spy from a rival company.
I’m not a great detective or anything, so maybe it's just my imagination?
Sorry for not being a great detective. But surely,
you're overthinking it.
Yeah, I guess that's true. I seem to have developed a habit of thinking negatively.
Sorry if I said something strange.
The director's daughter, right? She seemed smart and nice.
What? Are you interested in her?
That's not what I mean.
Guys all prefer young girls, right?
Isn't she pure and wonderful? If you're curious, why not just go for it? Just be warned, you might come off a bit logical.
Hey, hey, I'm not sure if that's a compliment or an insult.
Oh, did I say something weird?
Anyway, being young gives women all sorts of advantages.
It might be my misunderstanding, but
she seems to be interested in you.
Did I do something?
I mean, not like that, she surely likes you!
No way! We just met for the first time a bit ago.
Ah.
Ah, this is why you're like this.
Anyway, it would be wise not to treat her poorly, or it could end up costing you dearly.
Whoa, don't scare me.
Oh, it's not a threat, it's a warning.
Could it be that you and she are in love with each other?
It's the first time I've seen you up close, but she seems a bit mean.
Yeah, there's definitely a bit of a standoffish vibe.
That harsh look in her eyes must be the problem.
And yet they say she attracts guys; I just can't understand women's tastes these days.
Preferences are wildly different, you know.
That's true enough.
But he looks like a total thug, you know?
I always hear bad rumors about him.
He talked to me earlier, and he was looking at me with those sharp eyes; it really gave me the creeps.
But that can also mean,
that he’s got some charm, couldn’t you at least be a bit happy about that?
Are you serious about that?
I mean, a guy who only sees women as sexual objects is incredibly outdated.
What’s suddenly gotten into you?
Thinking of that look sends shivers down my spine. He’s definitely strange.
What if all those bad rumors are true?
Who are you talking about?
Cindy's agent.
Ah, that Chinese guy is all over her. He has a blank expression and is a bit creepy.
Do regular agents always stick around like that?
Cindy is still young, so he’s probably also acting as a caretaker.
Even if you say she's young, she's already 16, right? Ugh, I can't stand men.
Is that what they call a woman like her, an Oriental beauty?
Maybe it's just my imagination, but it feels like she's been glaring at me since a while ago.
Do you have any idea why?
Oh, it’s you. It’s you she’s glaring at.
Ah, is that so?
So, do you have any idea why?
Well, it seems like she thinks all men who get close to Cindy are to be hated.
Really?
Well, I can sort of understand that.
I still haven't had a proper conversation. Whenever I try, she only talks about Cindy.
That just shows how much she’s concerned about Cindy.
Still, it’s rude. I wish she would at least have a little common courtesy.
She might think she's being professional, but I don't want to get close to someone with that kind of attitude.
Cindy.
Ah, that girl with a dubious background.
That’s a rather harsh way to put it.
Well, I can’t stand those types that act all sycophantic.
Do you think she’s being sycophantic?
It’s beyond mere sycophancy. Just look at her eyes, her attitude.
Ugh, it makes my skin crawl!
Hey, did you know? That girl hasn’t even finished school properly. It's amazing how she carries herself with such confidence.
That’s not a good way to put it. You could easily be misunderstood.
What is it, don’t say things like that.
Ah.
, I don’t want to talk about that girl.
You know, Guy recently gave an interview where he said he likes Cindy.
Honestly, Guy is such a handful.
Right?
That’s why I just can’t bring myself to like Cindy. She’s such a cute daughter, though.
Cindy has everything that I’ve lost.
What have you lost?
Youth, firm skin, sparkling beauty.
The only thing I can beat her in is wisdom that comes with age.
What are you talking about? If you keep saying things like that, you’ll pass out before you become a grandma.
I don’t want to age and become ugly, so that’s fine with me.
Ah, I just can’t compete with young girls.
She’s an actress known for her sexy appeal that’s all the rage now. Since I’m a woman, I can’t see her charm.
Really? She’s got sexy appeal that’s become a buzz, but I think she’s also got acting skills.
Why are men always like that?
Did you know? She’s playing Guy’s girlfriend.
No way, you’re not jealous about that, are you?
Oh my, how rude. There’s no way that could be true!
It’s just a little bit annoying.
Right now, I don’t care about her.
Even though Meryl is in her mid-thirties, she’s still young.
Oh, she’s that age?
Why do you say it that way? That feels rude to women.
I wish you’d be a bit more forgiving since she’s not here.
Honestly, you are something.
But I can’t help but like her.
Tough on women,
which is rare for you. What’s going on with you?
She worked hard and overcame struggles to get where she is now. Her autobiography is out, and it's really well-written and relatable.
Oh really?
You read those kinds of books too?
Oh come on, that book is a bestseller.
I want to get to know her better.
I met her for the first time today, and she was quite different from what I imagined.
What did you imagine?
I thought she’d be more high-strung and difficult, but she seems like such a kind gentleman.
Haha.
Glad to hear that, it was a misunderstanding.
What’s that supposed to mean? You’re making fun of me!
But, according to rumors,
they say the director is hysterical, right?
Is that so? I didn’t know.
You’re still the same,
I think you should pay a bit more attention to the world around you.
By the way,
I heard the director is a widower.
Oh, really? What of it?
Well, there’s a rumor that his wife was
killed by him.
What!? Don’t say things like that.
Oh, that’s a well-known story.
Hey, the rumor about the director killing his wife, keep it a secret from him, okay? If he hears I mentioned it,
Don’t worry. Common sense says you wouldn’t bring it up in front of him, right?
Yeah, that’s true. But seriously, please keep it to yourself.
But he seems like a nice guy once you talk to him,
the director.
Guy, I’m looking forward to seeing you in this movie.
After all, it’s a hot director's
project.
Right! That’s true! Guy really seems happy about it.
When's the wedding with Guy?
Yeah, that's the thing,
you know, with all the movie shoots and everything, it seems like it’s going to be delayed.
That’s a bummer.
Yeah.
But don’t worry, we’re doing well.
Seeing Guy’s happy face is my joy.
Have you talked to Guy?
Yeah.
Did he say anything about me?
No, not really.
Lately, things have been a bit off. There have been a lot of little misunderstandings.
Are you okay?
I’m fine, you know, stuff like this happens.
Oh, you don’t have to worry about me. I'm really fine.
Since then, have you talked to Guy?
No, not really. It’s hard to approach him.
Plus, I think I calmed down a bit after you found out.
I see, should I say that's good then?
I should’ve consulted you earlier,
but we haven't met lately, have we? So I missed my chance.
Did Guy say anything? You know, about us?
No, nothing special.
I didn’t want to convey anything that came from Guy’s mouth. No, I shouldn’t do that.
If things got even more awkward between us, would you help me?
Oh, of course.
Oh, good.
Even if today doesn't work out, there's tomorrow. Cheer me on so I can make up with Guy.
Do you know anything about the recent sensational serial murder case that's been all over?
Which case? Those kinds of things aren’t that rare, and I’m not interested in bloody stuff.
Oh, right. You've always been out of the loop with murder cases.
Yeah, sorry about that.
As I said before, I'm not interested. I don't want you to talk about that kind of thing in front of me.
